what_was_requested: ETAP 2: Validate, publish, and backtest cf_choppiness_index as a regime filter for the trading strategy
what_was_done: 1. Validated cf_choppiness_index custom feature (required API fix from ctx[] to ctx.series()). 2. Published cf_choppiness_index to feature registry. 3. Built feature dataset with cf_choppiness_index column (54,864 rows, 17s). 4. Cloned baseline strategy 'active-signal-v1' to 'candidate_choppiness_index'. 5. Saved version 3 with cf_choppiness_index < 0.55 regime gate on both long and short entry signals. 6. Ran full-history backtest (2021-03-24 to 2024-12-31). 7. Recorded results to research memory. The choppiness filter reduced trades by 38% (308 vs 498) but PnL dropped 28% ($937.80 vs $1308.65). Sharpe was flat (1.060 vs 1.056). Max DD worsened slightly (3.00% vs 2.44%). Verdict: REJECT — does not meet PROMOTE criteria of ≥5% gain in ≥2 of {PnL, trades, DD}.
raw_output:
